question: Should children avoid all milk except plant-based alternatives?
topic: Addresses anti-dairy misinformation that could lead to nutritional deficiencies in growing children

sources.name: Complementary Feeding Interventions for Infants and Young Children Under Age 2: Scoping of Promising Interventions to Implement at the Community or State Level
Feeding Infants and Children from Birth to 24 Months: Summarizing Existing Guidance

discovery_sources.text: Whole milk recommended beyond age 2 in new dietary guidelines with evidence support, though author notes this should be individualized with healthcare provider
